active_trends.title: Xiaomi's Entry into AI Agents/LLMs with Upcoming API
active_trends.description: Xiaomi is actively developing AI models, potentially large language models (LLMs) or autonomous AI agents. There's anticipation around an upcoming release event and the implementation of a free one-week API, signaling their strategic expansion into the AI ecosystem and potential impact on developer offerings.

active_trends.title: Anticipation and Potential Impact of OpenAI's GPT-5
active_trends.description: Significant discussion and high anticipation surround the rumored release and advanced capabilities of OpenAI's GPT-5 model. The community, particularly programmers, is discussing its potential to become a 'pocket expert,' indicating a high level of developer interest in its technical applications and its impact on the development of AI agents and advanced LLM systems.
